case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE C. HUTCHIN COB

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE C. HUTCHIN COB IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,453.70 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-25-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEM, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,277.92 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT COB, JOSE C. HUTCHIN
